objectives.label: Clay your cobblestone
substeps: Right-click a Cobblestone block to pack it with clay.
You need eight Clayed Cobblestone in total.

objectives.label: Form the Kiln
substeps: Stack eight Clayed Cobblestone into a solid 2x2x2 cube.
The cube snaps into a Kiln the moment it is complete.
No door is needed — the kiln is loaded from the top.

objectives.label: Fire the Kiln
substeps: Right-click to load material and charcoal or coal as fuel.
Let it burn — it bakes brick, charcoal, and quicklime.

pages.text: Pack cobblestone with river clay to make &6clayed cobblestone&r, build it into a 2x2x2 dome, and you have a Kiln — a furnace that holds real heat long before you can smelt metal.

The kiln fires clay into brick and terracotta, chars wood into charcoal, and bakes limestone into the quicklime the tannery needs. It is charcoal-fed and has no door — load it, light it, and let it burn.
The kiln is the gateway to ceramics and tanning. Mastering it is the step between gathering and true industry.
